description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a medium-sized bird in flight, with outstretched wings and a streamlined body. The bird's plumage is predominantly white, with subtle gray shading on the head and underwings, and a yellow beak that is pointed and slightly conical. The wings are broad and slightly curved, with visible feather segmentation along the trailing edges. The tail is short and squared off, with a slight notch at the center, and the legs are tucked close to the body, showing yellow coloration. The overall form is smooth and simplified, lacking intricate feather detail but capturing the essential aerodynamic shape of a flying bird.
description: A smooth, white bird with outstretched wings, yellow beak, and squared tail, depicted in mid-flight with minimal feather detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's broad wingspan, pointed yellow beak, and symmetrical wing extension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bird's streamlined body, curved wing, and short squared tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full wingspan, squared tail, and yellow legs tucked beneath the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bird's profile, beak, and the feathered outline of the wing and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid white with subtle gray shading on head and underwings
